name: Build With AI KL Venture Catalyst 2026
description: A 24-week accelerator for Southeast Asian startups building software, platforms, or applied technology businesses with strong needs for mentor matching and relationship monitoring.

name: MDEC Digital Innovation Grant 2026
description: A government-backed grant programme funding Malaysian digital-economy startups at idea and pre-seed stage with up to MYR 500k in non-dilutive capital.

name: Sunway-YSEALI Regional Incubator 2026
description: A 16-week incubation programme for ASEAN founders building in healthtech, climate, and edtech — co-run with the US Embassy's YSEALI network.

name: CIMB SEA Fintech Challenge 2025
description: A competitive challenge programme for fintech, wealthtech, and embedded-finance startups across Southeast Asia, culminating in a demo day and pilot partnership offer.
